one_time_description: Loss of $8,000,000 on transfer of Volcano Creek Limited Partnership to Tahltan Heritage Trust, and $4,255,598 loss on reduction of Tahltan Heritage Trust investment to nil, totaling $12,255,598 in non-recurring investment losses
economic_notes: Band owns Iskut Band Development Corporation with four operating divisions including Kluachon Centre Store (cafe and retail). Band has 33.3% interest in Tahltan Nation Development Limited Partnership providing construction and support services. BCFN Gaming Revenue Sharing partnership active. Post year-end purchased Youth Center modular building ($308,000) and two septic hauling trucks ($169,000 and $298,000). Fisheries program transferred to Tahltan Central Government April 1, 2020. COVID-19 pandemic noted as uncertainty.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on multiple bases: (1) no updated financials for Iskut Band Development Corporation for 2019 and 2020; (2) no financials for Tahltan Nation Development Limited Partnership for 2020; (3) Tahltan Heritage Trust accounting method change from modified equity to cost not substantiated; (4) transfer of Volcano Creek LP to THT accounting uncertain; (5) Tahltan Nation Community Development Corporation dissolution records unavailable. Auditor firm name not identified in provided text. Large non-recurring losses of $12,255,598 recorded in investment line. Long-term debt includes $223,780 capital lease obligation. Current liabilities include $200,000 line of credit repaid April 1, 2020. Consolidated entity includes Iskut Rental Housing Operations and Iskut Energy Limited Partnership as fully consolidated subsidiaries. Prior year comparative figures restated with $165,232 prior period adjustment.
